words.def: a newspaper that is published every day
words.zh: a. 每日的, 日常的

words.def: a polite name for any woman
words.zh: n. 淑女, 夫人, 女士, 貴婦

words.def: time for Earth to make a complete rotation on its axis
words.zh: n. 天, 日子, 白天, 工作日
n. 幫助, 外援, 助手

words.def: a narrative song with a recurrent refrain
words.zh: vt. 放置, 產, 鋪設, 佈置, 提出, 平息
